payload.answer: Treat as the same memory. Keep one consolidated fact: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

payload.decision: No substantive conflict detected; the new statement is a paraphrase/duplicate of the existing memory. Preserve as a single current fact and avoid creating a second durable card.
